analysis_result: p = 8.92e-303 (chi-square = 1383.30, df=1). The 2x2 contingency test on probe counts (2121 promoter-island CpGs significantly hypermethylated in MPNST-G1 vs 301 in MPNST-G2) yielded an extremely small p-value, far below 1e-300. At the gene level (collapsing probes to unique UCSC_RefGene_Names: 891 G1-hypermethylated vs 219 G2-hypermethylated genes; 14,787 gene background), the chi-square p = 1.19e-93. Either formulation confirms a highly significant enrichment of hypermethylation in MPNST-G1 (Fig 1f, p < 0.001).
denominator_used: 97,525 promoter-CpG-island probes (EPIC array probes with Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island == 'Island' and UCSC_RefGene_Group containing TSS200/TSS1500/1stExon/5URT) assessed across 8 MPNST-G1 tumors (M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803) and 8 MPNST-G2 tumors (M1677, M1933, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413, M9450). Significance: |delta_beta (G1-G2)| > 0.1 AND FDR-adjusted t-test p < 0.05. 2x2 contingency: row1 = G1 [hyper=2121, not=95404], row2 = G2 [hyper=301, not=97224].
assumptions_made: Promoter CpG island definition: UCSC_RefGene_Group includes TSS200, TSS1500, 1stExon, or 5URT/5'UTR AND Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island == 'Island'; 5URT in manifest interpreted as 5'UTR; independent-samples t-test (equal variance) per probe; BH FDR correction across all 97,525 promoter island probes; 'methylated and silenced' operationalized as hypermethylation meeting both delta_beta and FDR thresholds (no independent transcriptomic silencing cross-check); trailing whitespace in the 'M3398 ' column in the beta file stripped before matching to the sample list; probes with all-NaN p-values replaced with p=1; 2x2 chi-square via scipy.stats.chi2_contingency comparing (hyper, not-hyper) between G1 and G2 over the 97,525-probe background; multi-gene probes contributed all listed genes at the gene-level sensitivity analysis.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx 'Clinical Data': 108 tumors x 15 cols. Methylation_Group: MPNST_G1 (n=8), MPNST_G2 (n=8).
   - GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz: 771,133 probes x 108 samples (sample column 'M3398 ' has trailing space).
   - GPL21145_MethylationEPIC_15073387_v-1-0.csv.gz (EPIC manifest, skiprows=7): 868,565 probes with Name, Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island, UCSC_RefGene_Group, UCSC_RefGene_Name.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - MPNST_G1 (n=8): M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803.
   - MPNST_G2 (n=8): M1677, M1933, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413, M9450.
   - All 16 sample columns present in beta file.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Promoter-CpG-island probes: manifest rows with Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island == 'Island' AND UCSC_RefGene_Group contains any of {TSS200, TSS1500, 1stExon, 5URT, 5'UTR}: 105,772 unique probes in manifest.
   - After intersecting with the beta matrix (771,133 probes), 97,525 promoter-island probes remained for analysis.
   - mean_g1, mean_g2 = per-probe mean beta across 8 samples each; delta_beta = mean_g1 - mean_g2.
   - Per-probe independent t-test (equal variance). BH FDR correction with statsmodels.stats.multitest.multipletests(method='fdr_bh').
   - 'Methylated' = |delta_beta| > 0.1 AND FDR < 0.05. Hyper-G1 if delta_beta > 0.1; hyper-G2 if delta_beta < -0.1.

D. COMPUTATION
   - Probes meeting FDR<0.05 alone: 2700. Probes meeting both criteria: 2422.
   - Hyper-G1 probes: 2121. Hyper-G2 probes: 301.
   - 2x2 contingency (scipy.stats.chi2_contingency): [[2121, 95404], [301, 97224]].
     chi2 = 1383.30, df = 1, p = 8.92e-303.
   - Gene-level sensitivity analysis (collapsing probes to UCSC_RefGene_Name, using 14,787 unique genes in the promoter-island background): G1 hyper = 891 genes, G2 hyper = 219 genes, 2x2 chi2 = 421.44, p = 1.19e-93.

E. RESULT
   - Primary (probe-level) chi-square p-value = 8.92e-303 (chi2 = 1383.30, df = 1).
   - Gene-level chi-square p-value = 1.19e-93.
   - Both are far below 0.001, consistent with the paper's statement that MPNST-G1 has significantly more hypermethylated/silenced promoter CpG islands than MPNST-G2.

F. CAVEATS
   - The EPIC manifest notation '5URT' is interpreted as '5'UTR' (apparent typo/encoding artifact in the vendor manifest).
   - 'Silenced' was inferred solely from hypermethylation at promoter islands; no transcriptomic confirmation was folded in (which the paper may have done separately). This may explain the exact chi-square value differing from the paper's reported statistic.
   - With only 8 samples per group, the t-test p-values are discretized; FDR thresholding remains conservative.
   - The contingency denominator (97,525 probes) assumes the paper's Fig 1f used the full promoter-island probe background; if the paper used a gene-level tabulation of the volcano plot, p ~= 1.19e-93 applies instead.
   - Absolute p-values below ~1e-300 saturate floating-point precision; the conclusion 'p << 0.001' is the robust statement.
